filter.placeholder: Search by title or Jira key...

archDiff.emptyDesc: See which modules were affected, new dependencies introduced, and the blast radius of this phase.
archDiff.emptyHint: Fast · Offline · Based on git diff

context.hint: These instructions will be injected at the start of the phase prompt.

branch.baseHint: We'll update to the project's latest version before creating your Workspace. Default: develop.

worktree.staleAlert: You have {{count}} stale Isolated Environment(s) from completed tasks

models.title: Model per Phase
models.description: Choose which Claude model to use for each LGE process phase.

shellEnv.title: Shell Environment
shellEnv.description: Commands to run before every Cockpit operation (git, Claude CLI, etc). One command per line. Lines starting with # are ignored.
shellEnv.placeholder:
# Example:
unset GOROOT
nvm use 18
pyenv shell 3.11

jira.title: Jira Connection
jira.description: Configure your Atlassian Cloud credentials to import tasks from Jira.
jira.apiTokenPlaceholder: Generate one at Atlassian account settings → Security → Create and manage API tokens
jira.apiTokenHint: Create an API token in your Atlassian account → Security → API tokens.

v080.title: v0.8.0 — Direct Jira API
v080.f1: Jira import now uses the Atlassian REST API directly — no MCP or Claude CLI required
v080.f2: Settings gains email and API token fields plus a "Test connection" button
v080.f3: Health check verifies Jira credentials instead of MCP availability

v071.title: v0.7.1 — Configurable Jira Base URL
v071.f1: Jira base URL field in Settings to build issue links
v071.f2: Removed hardcoded tenant URL; MCP prompts now derive the URL from the configured site

v070.title: v0.7.0 — Safe Deletion
v070.f1: Confirmation dialog before deleting tasks or projects
v070.f2: Automatic worktree and branch cleanup when deleting a task
v070.f3: Full cascade when removing a project: tasks, worktrees, and branches
v070.f4: Preview of affected resources in the project removal dialog
v070.f5: Delete button disabled while an LGE phase is running

v060.title: v0.6.0 — Attachments, Atlassian MCP & Markdown
v060.f1: Attach files (.md, .txt, .json, .csv) to a task as additional AI context
v060.f2: Granular phase selection: choose which LGE phases each file is injected into
v060.f3: Content automatically injected into prompts under '## Contexto Adicional'
v060.f4: Health check recognizes MCPs added via `claude mcp add` (e.g. `atlassian: uvx mcp-atlassian`)
v060.f5: Jira import tolerates different tool conventions (`getJiraIssue` / `jira_get_issue`)
v060.f6: Dedicated dialog when the Atlassian MCP needs OAuth: opens the link in the browser and lets you retry after authorizing
v060.f7: Verbatim Jira import: tables, code blocks, file paths, and lists are converted faithfully from ADF to Markdown — no more silent summarization
v060.f8: Task description renders as formatted Markdown: tables, code blocks, headings, and lists now display properly instead of as raw text

v050.title: v0.5.0 — Shell, Worktrees & Live Architecture
v050.f1: Custom shell environment settings per repository
v050.f2: Worktree cleanup button scoped to individual task (no side effects)
v050.f4: Live Architecture Diff — on-demand impact analysis per phase (files, lines, risk)
v050.f5: Worktree card appears immediately after branch creation

v040.title: v0.4.0 — Unified Artifacts
v040.f1: Single artifact per phase (Quick Context + full details)
v040.f3: Lower token usage per phase (no duplicate content)

v020.title: v0.2.0 — Git Integration
v020.f3: Open Pull Request from the app

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.pdfNotSupported: PDF/DOCX extraction not yet supported. Convert to .md or .txt.

repos.deleteStats: {{tasks}} task(s) · {{worktrees}} worktree(s) · {{branches}} branch(es) will be removed.
